channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Tim O’Brien speaks out on how his extortion case was handled by former colleagues
item.description: Tim O’Brien, a former provincial Crown prosecutor and current federal Crown prosecutor, was the victim of an extortion case in 2023 related to false sexual assault allegations. O’Brien was originally ...

item.title: Britney Spears detained overnight in California on suspicion of DUI
item.description: Pop star Britney Spears was taken into custody by California highway patrol officers late Wednesday night and spent several hours in detention before being released early Thursday morning. According t...

item.title: Kenya Airways Appoints Kittony as Chair and Adds Ndii, Diaz, Nyamute to Board
item.description: Kenya Airways, the Pride of Africa, has made significant changes to its board of directors to strengthen leadership as it pushes its turnaround strategy. The national carrier appointed Kiprono Kittony...

item.title: River and Bianca showcase fun sibling rivalry in ‘Kuya vs. Bunso Challenge’
item.description: The recent episode of ABS-CBN’s ‘Kuya vs. Bunso Challenge’ highlighted the playful yet endearing dynamics between River Joseph and Bianca de Vera, who are portrayed as siblings in this segment. The ch...

item.title: Dhabeji power outage disrupts Karachi’s water supply, causing potential daily shortfall of 100 MGD
item.description: Karachi faces a potential water shortage following a sudden power breakdown at the Dhabeji pumping station early Sunday morning. The Karachi Water & Sewerage Corporation (KWSC) reported that the fault...

item.title: DA Criticises ANC Over Gauteng Water Shortages and Use of Hotels
item.description: The Democratic Alliance (DA) has responded to a letter from the African National Congress (ANC) demanding the removal of a billboard in Tshwane. The billboard highlights comments made by Gauteng Premi...

item.title: Experts question feasibility of ACTU's five-week annual leave proposal amid low productivity
item.description: The Australian Council of Trade Unions (ACTU), led by secretary Sally McManus, has called for increasing the standard annual leave entitlement from four to five weeks. While the push aims to improve w...

item.title: Court Acquits Suspended DCP Abba Kyari and His Brothers Over Asset Allegations
item.description: The Federal High Court in Abuja, under Justice James Omotosho, don clear the suspended Deputy Commissioner of Police, Abba Kyari, and him two brothers from 23 charges wey National Drug Law Enforcement...

item.title: Trump Removes Kristi Noem as Homeland Security Secretary, Names Sen. Markwayne Mullin as Replacement
item.description: On March 5, 2026, President Donald Trump announced via Truth Social that Kristi Noem was being replaced as Secretary of the Department of Homeland Security, effective March 31, 2026. Trump nominated U...

item.title: India Offers Condolences Following Death of Iran’s Supreme Leader Amid US-Israel Strikes
item.description: India on Thursday officially expressed condolences on the death of Iran’s Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei, who was killed in a joint US-Israel military strike. Foreign Secretary Vikram Misri visited the I...

item.title: Paramount Outbids Netflix for Warner Bros Discovery: A Modern Parallel to Historical Publishing Strategies
item.description: Paramount Skydance has outbid Netflix to acquire Warner Bros Discovery, offering approximately US$111 billion (£82.2 billion). While the deal still faces regulatory approval, Warner Bros declared Para...

item.title: Starmer's initial refusal to aid US strikes on Iran highlights tensions in UK-US relations and lessons from Blair
item.description: Sir Keir Starmer faced criticism from the United States after initially refusing to permit US warplanes to use UK bases for attacks on Iran amid an ongoing conflict. He later approved their use for de...

item.title: Oburu Faction Opposes Leadership Elections at ODM Delegates Convention
item.description: Internal tensions in the Orange Democratic Movement (ODM) have flared up again as supporters of Siaya Senator Oburu Oginga firmly rule out holding party elections during the upcoming National Delegate...

item.title: Senator Ndume Confirms Loss of Lives in Ngoshe Boko Haram Attack
item.description: Senator Ali Ndume wey dey represent Borno South don confirm say plenty people don die—civilians, soldiers, and even some terrorists—after Boko Haram/ISWAP attack Ngoshe community for Borno State. Ndum...

item.title: Katsina Governor swears in Sani Ali Ahmed and Mannir Sullubawa as Commissioners
item.description: Katsina State Governor, Dikko Umaru Radda, don swear in two new commissioners wey the State House of Assembly don confirm. The new commissioners na Sani Ali Ahmed and Mannir Sullubawa. Governor Radda ...

item.title: Carlos and Alexa PenaVega reflect on grief and legacy after stillbirth of daughter Indy in 2024
item.description: Carlos and Alexa PenaVega, known from the Nickelodeon series *Big Time Rush*, have spoken about the impact of losing their fourth child, a daughter named Indy, who was stillborn in April 2024. In an e...

item.title: US Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem Steps Down Amid Criticism of Immigration Policies
item.description: US President Donald Trump has announced that Kristi Noem will step down as the Secretary of Homeland Security, a move that casts uncertainty over the future direction of his immigration policies. Noem...

item.title: Canadian Automaker Linamar Reports Record Growth Amid Vehicle Tariffs
item.description: Canadian automotive manufacturer Linamar has reported record growth, largely due to the impact of recent tariffs imposed on vehicles rather than auto parts. This distinction has benefitted domestic pr...

item.title: Yanga Secure 3-0 Victory Over Singida Black Stars to Extend Unbeaten League Run to 32 Matches
item.description: Defending champions Young Africans (Yanga) continued their strong form in the Tanzania Mainland Premier League by beating Singida Black Stars 3-0 at Airtel Stadium on March 5, 2026. The match started ...

item.title: Analysis of Iran's Strategic Missteps Leading to Khamenei's Death
item.description: The recent attack on Iran that killed Ayatollah Ali Khamenei and many senior commanders shows the consequences of long-term miscalculations. Israel and the US had been gradually encircling Iran with s...
